description: Call-to-action block with title, optional supporting text, and a button. Two variants: full-width (centered, bg surface) and inline (flex row).

id.description: Optional HTML id attribute for anchor linking (e.g. navigation anchors).

text.description: Supporting body text below the title.

variant.description: 'full-width' — centered block with surface background. 'inline' — flex row, text left, button right.

theme.description: Color theme. 'default' = surface/page background. 'dark' = dark surface. 'inverted' = inverted background for strong contrast. Combines with variant for layout + color.

background_image.description: Optional background image URL. When set, renders as a CSS background-image with a dark overlay. Text automatically uses light colors for contrast.
